definition:
1. the office of a  χορηγός at Athens, the defraying of the cost of the public choruses , being the chief of the λειτουργίαι, (Thucydides), etc. 
2. means for providing  χοροί: abundance of means, fortune , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
3. metaphorically supplies for war , (Polybius Historicus) (ML)
